canoe_types.name: Fishing Canoe
canoe_types.description: A nimble, shallow-draft canoe built for daily harvest runs to nearby fishing grounds. Quick to build, quick to launch.
canoe_types.notes: The workhorse. Every village needs several. Cannot undertake open-water crossings safely.

canoe_types.name: Travel Canoe
canoe_types.description: The backbone of coastal travel. Balanced for speed, cargo, and ocean safety. Suitable for multi-day voyages along protected channels.
canoe_types.notes: The first canoe type in the MVP. Can handle moderate open water with experienced crew.

canoe_types.name: Trade Canoe
canoe_types.description: Wide-beamed and deep-hulled, built to carry maximum cargo across long trade routes. Slower but immensely practical.
canoe_types.notes: Essential for large-scale trade and potlatch accumulation. Vulnerable to raiders due to slow speed.

canoe_types.name: War Canoe
canoe_types.description: Long, fast, and terrifying. Built for speed and crew capacity, with an intimidating carved prow. The sight of one on the horizon changes everything.
canoe_types.notes: Unlocked in Era 2. The premier military vessel. Doubles as a prestige display even in peacetime.

canoe_types.name: Prestige Canoe
canoe_types.description: The greatest canoe a village can build. Magnificently carved from prow to stern, painted in full formline design. Arriving in this canoe announces your village's power before a word is spoken.
canoe_types.notes: Unlocked in Era 3. Building one is a prestige act in itself. Arriving at a potlatch in a prestige canoe adds a significant bonus.

canoe_upgrades.name: Reinforced Hull
canoe_upgrades.description: Additional cedar planking and waterproofing strengthens the hull against heavy seas.

canoe_upgrades.name: Streamlined Prow
canoe_upgrades.description: A carefully shaped prow cuts through water more efficiently.

canoe_upgrades.name: Crest Prow Carving
canoe_upgrades.description: A carved crest figure adorns the prow, declaring identity and lineage to all who see it.

canoe_upgrades.name: Extended Gunwales
canoe_upgrades.description: Raised sides increase cargo capacity and wave protection.

canoe_upgrades.name: Blessed Hull
canoe_upgrades.description: Ceremonial blessing applied to the hull. Provides spiritual protection on voyages.

canoe_upgrades.name: War Shields
canoe_upgrades.description: Painted shields mounted along the gunwales. Protection and intimidation.

canoe_upgrades.name: Intimidation War Paint
canoe_upgrades.description: Bold formline painting on the hull and prow in fierce designs.

canoe_upgrades.name: Fish Hold
canoe_upgrades.description: Specially lined cargo area keeps fish fresh longer during harvest runs.

canoe_upgrades.name: Trade Banner
canoe_upgrades.description: A distinctive banner identifying the canoe as a trade vessel. Reduces hostile encounters.

canoe_upgrades.name: Full Formline Painting
canoe_upgrades.description: The entire hull painted in masterwork formline design. A floating work of art.

canoe_upgrades.name: Crest Stern Carving
canoe_upgrades.description: A matching carved figure at the stern. Combined with crest prow, creates a complete vessel.

canoe_upgrades.name: Ceremonial Canopy
canoe_upgrades.description: A decorated canopy for the chief's position. Used during ceremonial arrivals.
